must_have_quals: Strong experience in Data Engineering and backend development, Hands-on experience with Python / PySpark / SQL, Knowledge of ETL processes and data pipeline development, Experience with databases (SQL & NoSQL), Familiarity with Big Data tools (Spark, Hadoop – plus), Exposure to cloud platforms (AWS / Azure / GCP), Strong understanding of data modeling and warehousing concepts, Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills, Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field
core_responsibilities: Design, build, and maintain scalable data pipelines, Work with large-scale data processing and ETL workflows, Develop and optimize data architectures for analytics, Collaborate with cross-functional teams for data integration, Ensure data quality, reliability, and performance optimization
job_summary: Cloud Resources LLC is a leading Texas-based staffing firm specializing in providing top-tier IT talent across multiple technologies. They are seeking a skilled Data Engineer to join their team in a contract-based, on-site role, responsible for designing and maintaining scalable data pipelines and optimizing data architectures for analytics.
